code:
def check_parentheses_balance(expression):
    stack = []
    opening_brackets = "([{"
    closing_brackets = ")]}"
    bracket_map = {')': '(', ']': '[', '}': '{'}

    for char in expression:
        if char in opening_brackets:
            stack.append(char)
        elif char in closing_brackets:
            if not stack:
                return False
            last_open = stack.pop()
            if bracket_map[char] != last_open:
                return False
    
    return not stack

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Test cases
    print(check_parentheses_balance("()"))              # True
    print(check_parentheses_balance("()[]{}"))          # True
    print(check_parentheses_balance("{[()]}"))          # True
    print(check_parentheses_balance("({[()]})"))        # True
    print(check_parentheses_balance(""))                # True
    print(check_parentheses_balance("("))               # False
    print(check_parentheses_balance(")"))               # False
    print(check_parentheses_balance("(()"))             # False
    print(check_parentheses_balance("())"))             # False
    print(check_parentheses_balance("({[})"))           # False
    print(check_parentheses_balance("{[("))             # False
    print(check_parentheses_balance("([)]"))            # False
    print(check_parentheses_balance("{[()]}abc"))       # True (non-bracket chars are ignored)
prompt: Stack kullanarak parantez dengeleme kontrol et.
